summary: Converted most of the target-test stage files under melee/gr/grT- from assembly to C, adding C implementations and headers for grtfox, grtkirby, grtlink, grtseak, grtsamus, grtdrmario, grtzelda, and grtmario. The PR removed the corresponding asm/melee/gr/*.s files, updated obj_files.mk to build the new C objects, and reconstructed repeated StageCallbacks/StageData patterns plus common ground object setup callbacks. Review discussion specifically noted that remaining build/match errors were largely from missing or incorrect function signatures.
what_changed: Deleted eight assembly files for target-test stages: grtdrmario.s, grtfox.s, grtkirby.s, grtlink.s, grtmario.s, grtsamus.s, grtseak.s, and grtzelda.s.
Added C source files for the same eight stage modules under src/melee/gr/ and switched obj_files.mk entries from asm objects to src C objects.
Added small headers for each module, with grtmario.h containing a larger set of prototypes including lbl_8021FA08, lbl_8021FB50, and grTMario_8021FBE8.

Reconstructed StageCallbacks arrays and StageData globals such as grTDr_803E8850/grTDr_803E88AC, grTFx_803E89D8/grTFx_803E8A34, grTKb_803E8BB0/grTKb_803E8C0C, grTLk_803E8D30/grTLk_803E8D8C, grTMr_803E8548/grTMr_803E85A4, grTSs_803E93F8/grTSs_803E9454, grTSk_803E94B8/grTSk_803E9514, and grTZd_803E9638/grTZd_803E9694.

Implemented the repeated stage-init pattern: set stage_info.unk8C.b4 false and b5 true, create map GObjs for IDs 0, 1, and 2, then call Ground_801C39C0, Ground_801C3BB4, Ground_801C4210, and Ground_801C42AC.

Implemented repeated map object setup helpers that call Ground_801C14D0, initialize Ground user_data callbacks, call GObj_SetupGXLink with grDisplay_801C5DB0, invoke callback0 if present, install callback2 with HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54, and OSReport if the GObj cannot be fetched.

Implemented common no-op and boolean stub callbacks, animation callbacks using grAnime_801C8138 with gp->map_id, update callbacks using Ground_JObjInline1 and Ground_801C2FE0, and item/generator setup with grZakoGenerator_801CAE04.

grtmario.c included extra behavior beyond the common template: a Ground_801C10B8 callback path through lbl_8021FA08/lbl_8021FB50, fighter position checks via ftLib_80086644/ftLib_80086684/ftLib_80086B80, effect/generator logic via grTMario_8021FBE8 and grLib_801C96F8, and Ground_801C53EC.
smart_moves: The PR reused a highly regular C template across many grT stage modules, which is a strong tactic for matching sibling files with nearly identical assembly shapes.

The new C preserved data-layout-sensitive globals as StageCallbacks arrays and StageData objects, keeping callback order, file path strings like /GrTDr.dat and /GrTMr.dat, and flag expressions such as (1 << 31) | (1 << 30) visible in C.
The C expressed stage_info bitfield writes as stage_info.unk8C.b4 and b5 instead of hand-emitting rlwimi-style behavior, making the intent clearer while still matching the observed bit updates.

The shared object setup helper encoded the same callback dispatch order as assembly: clear x8/xC callbacks, setup GX link, copy callback3 into x1C_callback, call callback0, then register callback2 as a proc.
The author moved source ownership cleanly by deleting the matching asm files and replacing obj_files.mk entries with C object entries, avoiding mixed assembly/C duplication for these modules.
decomp_lessons: For families of near-clone stage files, match one representative carefully, then propagate the proven StageCallbacks/StageData and GObj setup structure to sibling modules with only symbol, dat-path, and line-number differences.
Function signatures matter for both build correctness and matching: the issue comment says nearly all errors were due to missing or incorrect signatures, with grtDrMario_8022050C cited as an example.

Target-stage modules often have a standard lifecycle surface: load/init, unload/no-op, item spawn setup, a false-return status callback, per-map callbacks, an anim getter returning NULL, and a collision/query callback returning true.
StageData callback fields require accurate return types and parameter types, including bool callbacks, HSD_GObj* callbacks, lb_UnkAnimStruct* anim getters, and Vec3/int/HSD_JObj* query callbacks.
When asm shows the same 0x14-byte callback records repeated, StageCallbacks is the reusable struct abstraction; indexing by map ID with &callbacks[arg0] matches the mulli-by-0x14 pattern.
OSReport format strings embedded near StageData can help recover source filenames and line constants, but these constants can vary by sibling file and should not be blindly copied.
Headers can unblock cross-file or data-table references, but prototypes should not be left as guessed void(void) forms when data tables or callers pass arguments.
naming_conventions: C symbols use grT<character>_<address> names, e.g. grtDrMario_802205B0, grTFox_80220C2C, grTKirby_80221408, grTLink_802219D0, grTMario_8021F8E4, grTSamus_80223624, grTSeak_80223908, and grTZelda_80223ED0.
Data symbols keep short stage abbreviations plus address suffixes: grTDr, grTFx, grTKb, grTLk, grTMr, grTSs, grTSk, and grTZd.
Stage .dat paths mirror those abbreviations, e.g. /GrTDr.dat and /GrTMr.dat.
The PR preserves address-suffixed lbl_ names for local callback-style functions in grtmario.c, notably lbl_8021FA08 and lbl_8021FB50.
Header guards in the added headers use lowercase file-derived names such as _grtmario_h_.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Translate repeated blr-only functions into empty void functions or simple bool return stubs according to the callback table signature.
Translate li r3, 0; blr callback cases into bool-returning functions returning false when the callback table expects a predicate.
Model mulli index-by-0x14 callback-table access as StageCallbacks* cb = &table[arg0].
Model user_data loads at gobj->0x2C as Ground* gp = gobj->user_data, then name observed callback fields x8_callback, xC_callback, x1C_callback, and map_id.
Keep the exact order of stage initialization calls after spawning IDs 0, 1, and 2: Ground_801C39C0, Ground_801C3BB4, Ground_801C4210, Ground_801C42AC.
Use shared inline/helper abstractions where available: Ground_JObjInline1 replaced repeated Ground_801C2ED0 plus grAnime_801C8138 sequences in several callbacks.
Preserve failure diagnostics with OSReport format string "%s:%d: couldn t get gobj(id=%d)\n" and file-specific source names.
For grtmario-specific code, the match used ftLib position helpers and a scaled generator effect path rather than forcing it into the simpler sibling template.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.text: Hi, thank you! Seems like nearly all of the errors are due to missing or incorrect function signatures. For example, changing `void grtDrMario_8022050C(void)` to `void grtDrMario_8022050C(bool)` resolves that error.
review_feedback.lesson: Before chasing codegen, verify all function pointer and externally referenced prototypes match the actual call sites and data-table expectations.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename or type StageCallbacks fields used by grT stage files.
Search for subsequent fixes to grtDrMario_8022050C signature or other grT init callback prototypes.
Compare these grT modules with other target-test stage modules to extract a reusable decomp template.
Audit whether the added headers kept static-only prototypes long term or were later reduced/cleaned up.
Search grTMario_8021FBE8 and lbl_8021FB50 for later naming or struct improvements around UnkGeneratorStruct.
